name: read_text
description: Full text of the current Google DOC (the kix editor).

name: doc_title
description: Title of the current Google Doc.

name: read_text_sheets
description: Values of the visible cells in the current Google SHEET (Docs/Sheets share docs.google.com — this is the Sheets variant of read_text).

name: rename_doc
description: Rename the current Google Doc. args:{title}. Verified: sets the title input + commits via Enter; the browser tab title (document.title) reflects the committed name.
